The Divergent Series: Insurgent (also known simply as Insurgent) is a 2015 American science fiction action film directed by Robert Schwentke, based on "Insurgent", the second book in the "Divergent" trilogy by Veronica Roth.  It is the sequel to the 2014 film "Divergent" and the second installment in "The Divergent Series", produced by Lucy Fisher, Pouya Shabazian and Douglas Wick, with a screenplay by Brian Duffield, Akiva Goldsman and Mark Bomback.
